# Curvachip LLC — Complete Site Content

> This file contains the full text content of curvachip.com for AI agents and crawlers.
> Source: https://curvachip.com | Updated: 2025
> Index: https://curvachip.com/llms.txt

---

## Home — curvachip.com

Curvachip distributes privacy-first apps on the App Store — designed for clarity, built with care, and shaped by the people who use them.

**What we stand for**

- **User-Focused Design** — Every decision is made with a single question in mind: does this make it easier for the user?
- **Privacy by Default** — On-device processing wherever possible. No silent collection. What stays on your device stays on your device.
- **Feedback-Driven** — Criticism is a gift. Every App Store review, every email, every bug report shapes the next update.

**Testimonial**

"We all enjoyed and appreciated Michael's preparation, his earnest interest in listening, and his thoughtful dialogue … he is ready to GO!" — Cathy Hayes, Hayes Inc.

---

## About — curvachip.com/about

**Mission**

Each app that Curvachip launches is built for a purpose. That purpose is discovered through the people we encounter every day — the frustrated dinner guest doing mental arithmetic, the hiker who can't identify a plant, the professional who can't stay focused. A great app idea is not founded on some revolutionary principle. It is founded on meeting a real need for a real group of people.

**Vision**

Technology is humanity's greatest friend and its greatest distraction. Through the apps Curvachip builds, the goal is to bring people back to the real world — to nature, to focused work, to shared meals. Software should be a tool that serves a moment, not a trap that consumes your attention.

**Values**

- User first, always
- Privacy is not a feature — it is a baseline expectation
- Criticism is a gift
- Ship with intention

**Leadership**

Curvachip is led by Michael S., its founder, CEO, and sole developer. Michael handles product management, design, marketing, and deployment.

**Timeline**

- 2023 — Concept: the idea for Curvachip begins
- 2024 — First launch: Curvachip LLC established, first apps on the App Store
- 2025 — Expansion: the Clip family grows with StoneClip, BugClip, and PlantClip
- 2026 — Continuing to develop, refine, and listen

---

## Apps — curvachip.com/apps

### Shadow Task
**Pomodoro Timer & Progress Tracker | iOS · iPadOS · macOS | Free + IAP**
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6737145799?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

Keep your focus sharp, your privacy protected, and your productivity soaring. Features: customizable timed tasks, Dynamic Island and Live Activity support, repeating sessions, visual progress tracking, motivational quotes, zero data collection.

Privacy: Data Not Collected. Everything stays on your device.

### TipZap
**Tip Calculator | iOS · iPadOS | Free**
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6743986322?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

Split dinner costs, round totals, and calculate tips in seconds. Features: instant tip calculation, round up or down, split up to 30 ways, saved custom percentage, 8-country tipping guides, regional currencies.

Privacy: Data Not Collected.

### StoneClip
**Rock, Gem & Crystal Identifier | iOS · iPadOS | Free + IAP**
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6744538893?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

AI-powered rock and crystal identification from a photo. Features: snap or select for instant ID, in-depth descriptions, follow-up questions, identification history, shareable results.

Privacy: Data Not Linked to You. Only submitted images are processed externally.

### BugClip
**Insect & Spider Identifier | iOS · iPadOS | Free + IAP**
App Store: hhttps://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6745129568?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

AI-powered bug identification. Features: instant identification, clear friendly information, chat history, one free daily identification, global coverage.

Privacy: Data Not Linked to You.

### PlantClip
**Plant & Flower Identifier | iOS · iPadOS | Free + IAP**
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6745438705?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

AI-powered plant identification for hikers, gardeners, and the curious. Features: instant plant ID, toxicity warnings, field journal feel, no region lock.

Privacy: Data Not Linked to You.
Disclaimer: Not a substitute for professional foraging advice. Never consume wild plants based solely on AI identification.

### Grocery Wiz
**Smart Grocery List | iOS · iPadOS | Free**
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6746955108?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

Intelligent shopping assistant. Features: smart tagging, priority marking, category sections, print-ready layouts, quick add and edit.

Privacy: Data Not Collected.

### Tally Snap
**Click Counter | iOS · watchOS | Free**
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6746059766?pt=127392432&ct=website&mt=8

Simple, thoughtful counter with haptic feedback and Apple Watch support. Features: instant counting, haptic feedback, rename and color tallies, Apple Watch support, no ads.

Privacy: Data Not Collected.

---

## Privacy — curvachip.com/privacy

**Privacy is not a feature. It is the foundation.**

Privacy shapes every product decision at Curvachip before a single line of code is written.

**Key facts:**
- 4 apps collect zero data
- 0 advertising SDKs used across all apps
- 7 individual app privacy policies published
- 0 cookies on curvachip.com

**Four principles:**

1. Collect only what is necessary — every data point has a specific, stated reason
2. Process on-device by default — four of seven apps collect zero data
3. Disclose before collecting — AI apps say so clearly on the App Store listing before download
4. No advertising, ever — data is never sold, shared with advertisers, or used for profiling

**App privacy labels (Apple App Store):**

| App | Privacy Label |
|---|---|
| Shadow Task | Data Not Collected |
| TipZap | Data Not Collected |
| Grocery Wiz | Data Not Collected |
| Tally Snap | Data Not Collected |
| StoneClip | Data Not Linked to You |
| BugClip | Data Not Linked to You |
| PlantClip | Data Not Linked to You |

**Website privacy:** curvachip.com sets no cookies, uses no analytics, runs no tracking scripts. The contact form opens the user's own mail client. The only external request is Google Fonts.

---

## Contact — curvachip.com/contact

**Email:** developer@curvachip.com
**Response time:** Usually within 2 business days.

---

## Privacy Policy — curvachip.com/privacy/website

curvachip.com is a static website. It collects no personal data. No cookies are set. No analytics platform is used. The contact form opens the user's local mail client — no data passes through Curvachip servers. The only external request is Google Fonts loading font files (governed by Google's privacy policy). Server access logs may be retained by the hosting provider; Curvachip does not access these.

---

## Terms of Use — curvachip.com/privacy/terms-of-use

These terms govern use of curvachip.com and all Curvachip apps. Apps are distributed via the Apple App Store under a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence for personal non-commercial use. AI-generated content from Curvachip apps is for informational purposes only and is not professional advice. All content is the intellectual property of Curvachip LLC. Apple is a trademark of Apple Inc.; Curvachip LLC is not affiliated with Apple.

---

## Blog: AI Chatbot Data Risks — curvachip.com/privacy/blog/ai-chatbots

**What You Share with AI Chatbots Stays There**

AI assistants are useful tools, but everything you type is transmitted to a server you don't control, governed by policies that may not prioritise your interests.

**What AI companies collect:** message text, AI responses, session metadata, device type, timestamp, approximate location, attached files.

**Key risks:**
- Training data inclusion — free-tier conversations may become training data
- Human review — a percentage of conversations are reviewed by contractors
- Server-side storage — governed by changeable policies, subject to legal requests
- Third-party data sharing — usage data may be shared with advertising or analytics partners
- Breach exposure — data shared months ago could surface in future incidents

**What you should never send to an AI chatbot:**
- Passwords or PINs
- Social security or national identity numbers
- Bank account or credit card details
- Medical records or diagnoses
- Legal or attorney-client privileged documents
- Confidential business plans or source code
- Personal information about someone else without consent

**How to use AI safely:**
1. Read the privacy policy and opt out of training data usage in account settings
2. Anonymise before pasting — replace real names and numbers with placeholders
3. Use on-device AI where it matters
4. Regularly delete your conversation history
5. Treat AI as a colleague, not a vault

**Curvachip's approach:** On-device by default. AI features disclosed clearly before download. Minimal collection. No advertising. Each app has its own privacy policy.
